svg.title: Public user interaction diagram
svg.desc: Step-by-step interaction flow for a public visitor on Shasnadesh: landing, browsing, filtering, reading, sharing, and offline use.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a user see when they first visit Shasnadesh?')
g.text: Browser or Playstore APP or Install PWA

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the service worker handle the first page load?')
sendPrompt('What renders on the Home page of Shasnadesh?')
sendPrompt('How does the search and filter work in Shasnadesh?')
sendPrompt('What does the API return when filtering blogs?')
sendPrompt('How does pagination work on the home page?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a user clicks a blog card?')
sendPrompt('What does BlogDetail.jsx fetch and render?')
sendPrompt('What actions can a user take while reading a blog?')
sendPrompt('How does the share button work in Shasnadesh?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a user clicks back to all posts?')
